name: capable-wealth
description: Content production harness for Capable Wealth (Jared Paul, CFP): financial content for orthopedic surgeons. Seven skills that load the brand context, enforce every production rule, gate quality, produce on-voice content, and learn from Jared's corrections over time. Invoke a skill by name, e.g. /generate-batch, /validate, /linkedin-check, /retro. The /retro skill runs a weekly recursive-learning pass that turns logged revision requests into proposed brand-doc improvements. Requires the Project to be linked to the capable_wealth folder (brand/, rules/, src/, outputs/) for the skills to read the brand docs.
